raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, an unauthorized charge was made to a virtual credit card in the amount of XXXX to XXXX store. I notified Citicard around XX/XX/XXXX regarding this. I completed a letter sent to me XX/XX/XXXX with details and proof of where the item in question was delivered including stating that I had been hacked. As of today, Citi has mishandled my dispute. It still is not reflecting on their portal dispute center, and never sent me a letter with the status in spite of my being told in a chat last week XXXX XXXX my dispute was denied since according to them it wasn't proven charge was fraudulent. I was told the letter had been sent XX/XX/XXXX, and I notified I never received it. As of today, I still have not received it. Without that, I have no way to know exactly why they made their decision and I can not appeal without the information.
